title: Have you used AI to take trades, and what are your experiences?
author: Haunting_Tax_5991
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/c4a7lz3srf1h1.png?width=662&format=png&auto=webp&s=b539bec06dab0431acd06d9d481f543ccb2dd55b

  
I didn't know AI had really gained a lot of ground in the trading world until I started trying it out, and honestly, it has not been bad. I could use GetClaw to do the analysis of a coin while I inform ChatGPT to look for the perfect setup, and boom, I have a full trade setup with zero stress.

Before, I didn’t actually believe AI could do something like that. I remember a friend on [X ](https://x.com/trozan006/status/2054882291667681331)made me develop a strong mindset toward using AI for trading after seeing the winnings he kept having back-to-back. Whenever he participated in AI agent trading competitions, he always came back with a USDT prize.

So in conclusion, AI is transforming and doing wonders, and the opportunity to make good money is there. Just have the right prompt, then you will have the right human-AI combination.

What have you used AI to do?
